title: Superstars too strong for Phoenix
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Wilderness Superstars won comprehensively the past weekend against Phoenix with 31-13 in a SWD Coastal league Eastern Division game that was played in New Horizon (Plettenberg bay). Superstars was already ahead at the half time mark leading with 21-6.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Wilderness Superstars won comprehensively the past weekend against Phoenix with 31-13 in a SWD Coastal league Eastern Division game that was played in New Horizon (Plettenberg bay). Superstars was already ahead at the half time mark leading with 21-6."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This victory means that after 11 games, Superstars are still unbeaten leading the log with 49 points after 11 games.","html":"This victory means that after 11 games, Superstars are still unbeaten leading the log with 49 points after 11 games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in the week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"
Read more in the week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
